sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99938" key="sunekklitiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-κλῐτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n99938.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conjugable</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λέξεις</foreign>, i.e. verbs, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosith.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.406K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
